summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Dr. Rashi Agrawal's medical landing page. All critical features are working correctly. Logo displays properly in both header (with mix-blend-mode:multiply) and footer (in white container on dark background). All sections render completely, navigation works, booking flow is functional, and mobile responsiveness is excellent.
critical_code_review_comments: All data is MOCKED on frontend - no backend integration
Contact form and booking form submissions are mocked (toast notifications only)
Code structure is clean with proper component separation
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Added missing data-testid='whatsapp-button' to WhatsAppButton component
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only React app with all mocked data. No backend APIs. All features tested and working. Logo displays correctly in header and footer.

header.logo_display: PASS - Logo correctly loaded with mix-blend-mode:multiply style
header.book_appointment_button: PASS - Pink gradient color scheme applied
header.navigation_links: PASS - All links work (scroll to sections)

hero_section.specialties: PASS - Radiation Oncology, Head & Neck Cancer, Urological Malignancy, Bone & Soft Tissue Sarcoma displayed
hero_section.cta_buttons: PASS - Pink gradient Book Appointment and Call Now buttons

contact_section.locations: PASS - Both Max Hospital and Clinic displayed

footer.logo: PASS - Logo displayed in white container (bg-white rounded-lg px-3 py-2)
footer.social_links: PASS - Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, Google Reviews

book_appointment_page.hospital_selection: PASS - Max Hospital and Clinic options
book_appointment_page.booking_form: PASS - Name and phone inputs work

features_tested.whatsapp_button: PASS - Floating button visible on desktop and mobile

mobile_responsiveness.header: PASS - Logo and hamburger menu visible
mobile_responsiveness.footer: PASS - Logo visible in white container
mobile_responsiveness.booking_page: PASS - Hospital selection and calendar work
